title: T-033 — Pick override audit service
prompt:
# T-033 — Pick override audit service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §9.6, V-WH-FEFO-002.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`logPickOverride(input)` server function inserting a `pick_overrides` row when picked LP differs from FEFO suggestion.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/pick-override-log.ts`. Compute delta_days = (picked.expiry - suggested.expiry). Validate reason_code in enum; reason_text required if 'other' (V-WH-FEFO-002 + DB CHECK). Used by both desktop pick and Scanner consume-to-WO endpoint (T-034).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/pick-override-log.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/pick-override-log.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given suggested LP expiry 2026-05-01 and picked LP expiry 2026-05-10, when logPickOverride runs, then delta_days=9 and a pick_overrides row exists.
2. Given reason_code='other' without reason_text, when called, then V-WH-FEFO-002 error returns.
3. Given suggested.id == picked.id, when called, then service rejects (no override needed) and returns no-op response.

## Test strategy
- RED: pick-override-log.test.ts covers happy path, invalid reason text, no-op same LP.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test pick-override-log`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not log when suggested == picked.
- Do not skip reason_text for 'other'.
- Do not call this during reservation creation (only during actual pick/consume).

pipeline_inputs.details: Compute delta_days; validate reason; no-op if picked == suggested.
acceptance_criteria: Given expiries 2026-05-01 vs 2026-05-10, when run, then delta_days=9 and a pick_overrides row exists
Given reason_code='other' without reason_text, when run, then V-WH-FEFO-002 error returns
Given suggested.id == picked.id, when run, then no-op response returns
test_strategy: RED: pick-override-log.test.ts covers happy path, invalid text, no-op
risk_red_lines: Do not call during reservation creation
